title: Revenue summary endpoint with YTY comparison
description: Build GET /revenue/summary that returns Transactional, Stream, and Total revenue rows. Each row must include budget, actual, variance, budget_percent, and yty_percent. Compare current quarter vs same quarter prior year.

title: Top deals and negative deals endpoints
description: GET /revenue/top-deals returns top N customers by revenue in the selected quarter. GET /revenue/negative-deals returns customers with largest YTY revenue decline, including opportunity owner name and email from pipeline data.

title: Quarterly revenue trend chart endpoint
description: GET /revenue/quarterly returns trailing quarters split by Transactional vs Stream revenue. Must support year, quarter, and region filter params. Used to power the revenue trend line chart.

title: Revenue by IOT/geography segment
description: GET /revenue/by-iot returns revenue broken down by geography segment (Americas, EMEA, APAC, Japan). Returns segments array and total_revenue. Used for the regional breakdown pie/bar chart.

title: Customer segmentation — new vs growth
description: GET /revenue/customer-segmentation segments customers into new (not seen in prior year same quarter) vs growth (existing). Returns count and revenue for each segment.

title: Global filter bar — year, quarter, region, product, UT30 dropdowns
description: GET /filters returns dropdown options derived from the live data: years, quarters, regions, products, ut30s, and pipeline_quarters. All revenue and pipeline endpoints must respect year, quarter, region, product, and ut30 query params.

title: Excel workbook upload — ingest sheets into PostgreSQL
description: POST /upload accepts a multipart Excel file. Each sheet becomes a PostgreSQL table named {filename}__{sheet}. Replace existing table on re-upload. Return filename, sheets loaded, and total rows ingested.

title: Pipeline won and lost opportunities by quarter
description: GET /pipeline/won-prior and GET /pipeline/lost-prior return top customers by opportunity value for the prior quarter. GET /pipeline/won-current returns won opps for the current quarter at the selected week snapshot.

title: Pipeline opportunity value and stage breakdown by week
description: GET /pipeline/opp-value-by-week returns total pipeline value and opp count per week for the prior quarter. GET /pipeline/opp-stages-by-week returns opp count per sales stage per week (engage, design, qualify, propose, negotiate, closing, won, lost) for stacked area chart.

title: Pipeline year-over-year comparison with transactional target line
description: GET /pipeline/opp-value-yoy returns weekly pipeline totals for current quarter vs same quarter prior year, plus a transactional target line from the budget table. Used for the YoY trend chart.

title: Active pipeline KPI tiles by sales stage
description: GET /pipeline/active-by-stage returns summary tiles (active pipeline, won, lost, seller forecast = Y) and per-stage tiles for the current quarter at the selected week. Each tile has label, primary value ($M), and secondary (opp count).

title: Top current quarter opportunities table
description: GET /pipeline/top-current-opps returns largest active opps forecast to close this quarter. Fields: customer_name, opp_age, sales_stage, market_name, seller_fcst (Y/N), value. Excludes opps older than 365 days.

title: Qualtrics satisfaction summary and segment distribution
description: GET /satisfaction/summary returns total responses, avg OSAT, satisfaction score (high% - low%), and High/Neutral/Low percentages. GET /satisfaction/distribution returns the count and percentage for each segment for pie chart.

title: Satisfaction breakdown by product and region
description: GET /satisfaction/by-product groups satisfaction metrics by product name. GET /satisfaction/by-region groups by country. Both return response_count, avg_osat, satisfaction_score, high_pct, low_pct per group.

title: Satisfaction trend over time (monthly/weekly)
description: GET /satisfaction/trend returns satisfaction metrics grouped by time period (month or week). Supports period param. Returns avg_osat, high_pct, neutral_pct, low_pct per period for the trend chart.

title: Email campaign funnel metrics
description: GET /satisfaction/email-funnel returns sent, opened, started, completed counts from the Qualtrics email campaigns table, plus open_rate, start_rate, and completion_rate percentages.

title: Low satisfaction alerts for immediate follow-up
description: GET /satisfaction/low-satisfaction-alerts returns the most recent Low segment survey responses sorted by date descending. Fields: response_id, date, product, region, osat_score, customer_email, comments.

title: watsonx AI pipeline insights endpoint
description: GET /ai/insights calls IBM Granite via watsonx.ai to generate 4 actionable pipeline insights based on a live data summary. Requires WATSONX_API_KEY and WATSONX_SPACE_ID env vars. Returns insights array and the raw summary sent to the model.

title: Product rollup — bucket raw UT30 values into canonical product names
description: All product/UT30 filter dropdowns must show canonical product names (e.g. 'Z IT Automation') not raw UT30 codes. Raw values are bucketed by keyword matching rules defined in PRODUCT_ROLLUP. Filtering by a canonical name expands to all matching raw values in SQL.

title: Schema validation on startup with column mismatch warnings
description: On startup, verify every column name in the COL mapping exists in the revenue table. If a column is missing, print a warning with the closest matching column name using difflib. All column names must be configurable in a single COL dict — no hardcoded names elsewhere.
